# Scientific story {#sec-story}

```{r}
#| label: story-setup
#| include: false
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(ggplot2)
  library(patchwork)
})
options(warn = 2)
targets::tar_source()
targets::tar_load(story_figures)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE)
theme_set(theme_tau(base_size = 10.5))

sf <- story_figures
contrast_labels <- c(
  tau_alone = "tau alone",
  nlgf_in_maptki = "amyloid on MAPTKI",
  nlgf_in_p301s = "amyloid on P301S",
  tau_in_nlgf = "tau in NLGF",
  interaction = "interaction"
)
focus <- c("interaction", "nlgf_in_maptki", "nlgf_in_p301s", "tau_in_nlgf")
fmt_int <- function(x) format(as.integer(round(x)), big.mark = ",", trim = TRUE)
plot_contrast <- function(x, levels = focus, reverse = FALSE) {
  lv <- if (reverse) rev(levels) else levels
  factor(x, levels = lv, labels = unname(contrast_labels[lv]))
}

dam_unit <- sf$dam_response$unit
dam_unit$genotype <- factor(as.character(dam_unit$genotype), levels = genotype_levels)
dam_unit$tau_background <- factor(as.character(dam_unit$tau_background),
                                  levels = c("MAPTKI", "P301S"))
dam_unit$amyloid <- factor(as.character(dam_unit$amyloid), levels = c("NLGF-", "NLGF+"))
dam_mean <- sf$dam_response$mean
dam_mean$tau_background <- factor(as.character(dam_mean$tau_background),
                                  levels = c("MAPTKI", "P301S"))
dam_mean$amyloid <- factor(as.character(dam_mean$amyloid), levels = c("NLGF-", "NLGF+"))

de_signed <- sf$de_counts$signed
de_signed <- de_signed[de_signed$contrast %in% names(contrast_labels), , drop = FALSE]
de_signed$contrast <- factor(de_signed$contrast, levels = rev(names(contrast_labels)),
                             labels = rev(unname(contrast_labels)))
de_signed$label <- ifelse(de_signed$n == 0, "", fmt_int(de_signed$n))
de_max <- max(1, max(abs(de_signed$n_signed), na.rm = TRUE))
de_pad <- de_max * 0.035
de_signed$label_x <- de_signed$n_signed + ifelse(de_signed$n_signed < 0, -de_pad, de_pad)
de_signed$label_hjust <- ifelse(de_signed$n_signed < 0, 1, 0)

traj <- sf$trajectory
traj$supported <- factor(traj$supported, levels = c(FALSE, TRUE))

mech <- sf$mechanism
mech$item <- factor(mech$item, levels = rev(unique(mech$item)))
mech$supported <- factor(mech$supported, levels = c(FALSE, TRUE))
mech_myc <- mech[mech$track == "Myc TF", , drop = FALSE]
mech_bounds <- mech[mech$track != "Myc TF", , drop = FALSE]

clearance <- sf$clearance
clearance <- clearance[clearance$contrast %in% focus, , drop = FALSE]
clearance$contrast <- plot_contrast(clearance$contrast)
clearance$pair_label <- factor(clearance$pair_label, levels = rev(unique(clearance$pair_label)))
clearance$supported <- factor(clearance$supported, levels = c(FALSE, TRUE))
clearance_pair <- clearance[clearance$pair == "Apoe_Trem2", , drop = FALSE]
clearance_pair_max <- max(2, max(clearance_pair$n_supported_modalities, na.rm = TRUE))
clearance_pair_slots <- seq_len(ceiling(clearance_pair_max))
clearance_pair_dots <- do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_len(nrow(clearance_pair)), function(i) {
  data.frame(contrast = clearance_pair$contrast[i],
             supported = clearance_pair$supported[i],
             slot = clearance_pair_slots,
             filled = clearance_pair_slots <= clearance_pair$n_supported_modalities[i],
             stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
}))
clearance_pair_dots$dot_state <- factor(
  ifelse(clearance_pair_dots$filled,
         ifelse(as.character(clearance_pair_dots$supported) == "TRUE", "earned", "partial"),
         "not counted"),
  levels = c("not counted", "partial", "earned")
)

clearance_effects <- sf$mechanism_crossmodality$clearance_effects
clearance_effects <- clearance_effects[clearance_effects$measured_state_chr == "measured", , drop = FALSE]
clearance_effects$plot_status <- factor(clearance_effects$plot_status,
                                        levels = c("supported/earned",
                                                   "measured, not supported",
                                                   "not observed", "blocked",
                                                   "not applicable"))
```

## Core evidence

```{r}
#| label: fig-story-core
#| fig-width: 11
#| fig-height: 5.1
#| fig-cap: "Amyloid drives DAM activation; P301S amplifies composition, not progression."
#| fig-alt: "Composite figure with DAM fraction response, signed microglia DE counts, and trajectory interaction decomposition."
p_dam <- ggplot(dam_unit, aes(amyloid, proportion, colour = tau_background,
                              group = tau_background)) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitter(width = 0.035, height = 0),
             size = 1.45, alpha = 0.56) +
  geom_line(data = dam_mean, aes(y = mean), linewidth = 0.72) +
  geom_pointrange(data = dam_mean, aes(y = mean, ymin = lo, ymax = hi),
                  linewidth = 0.42) +
  scale_colour_tau_background(name = "tau background") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(round(100 * x), "%")) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "DAM fraction", title = "DAM response") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank())

p_de <- ggplot(de_signed, aes(n_signed, contrast)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, colour = "grey65", linewidth = 0.35) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = direction), width = 0.58, alpha = 0.88,
           colour = "#F8F6F1", linewidth = 0.18) +
  geom_text(aes(x = label_x, label = label, hjust = label_hjust),
            size = 2.75, colour = "#333333") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = tau_direction_colours, name = "direction") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = function(x) fmt_int(abs(x))) +
  labs(x = "genes at FDR < 0.10", y = NULL,
       title = "Amyloid DE dominates") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-de_max * 1.24, de_max * 1.24), clip = "off") +
  theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom")

p_traj <- ggplot(traj, aes(coef, measure_label, colour = supported)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, colour = "grey70") +
  geom_pointrange(aes(xmin = ci_l, xmax = ci_r), linewidth = 0.48) +
  scale_colour_tau_binary(name = "FDR < 0.10") +
  labs(x = "tau x amyloid effect", y = NULL,
       title = "Composition channel") +
  theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom")

(p_dam | p_de | p_traj) +
  plot_layout(widths = c(1.1, 1.15, 1.05), guides = "collect") +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

## Mechanism and integration

```{r}
#| label: fig-story-mechanism-crossmodality
#| fig-width: 11
#| fig-height: 6.4
#| fig-cap: "Cross-modality support narrows the mechanism to Myc and clearance context."
#| fig-alt: "Composite figure with Myc TF effects, NF-kB and Gsk3b boundary effects, and focused Apoe-Trem2 clearance evidence."
p_myc <- ggplot(mech_myc, aes(score, item, fill = supported)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, colour = "grey75") +
  geom_point(aes(size = neg_log10_fdr), shape = 21, colour = "#262B2F", stroke = 0.28) +
  scale_fill_tau_binary(name = "FDR < 0.10") +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(1.4, 4.8), name = "-log10 FDR") +
  guides(fill = "none", size = "none") +
  labs(x = "signed TF score", y = NULL, title = "Myc interaction signal") +
  theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none")

p_bounds <- ggplot(mech_bounds, aes(score, item, fill = supported)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, colour = "grey75") +
  geom_point(aes(size = neg_log10_fdr), shape = 21, colour = "#262B2F", stroke = 0.28) +
  facet_wrap(~ track, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_tau_binary(name = "FDR < 0.10") +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(1.3, 4.2), name = "-log10 FDR") +
  guides(fill = "none", size = "none") +
  labs(x = "signed score", y = NULL, title = "Unsupported boundaries") +
  theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none")

p_clear_effect <- ggplot(clearance_effects,
                         aes(plot_effect, feature_label_plot, colour = modality_label)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, colour = "grey75") +
  geom_point(aes(shape = plot_status), size = 2.0, stroke = 0.45) +
  facet_wrap(~ contrast_label, nrow = 1) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = tau_discrete_colours, name = NULL) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(`supported/earned` = 16,
                                `measured, not supported` = 1,
                                `not observed` = 4,
                                blocked = 17,
                                `not applicable` = 3),
                     drop = FALSE, name = NULL) +
  labs(x = "log2 effect", y = NULL, title = "Apoe-Trem2 effect context") +
  theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom")

p_pair <- ggplot(clearance_pair_dots, aes(slot, contrast, fill = dot_state)) +
  geom_point(shape = 21, size = 3.1, colour = "#262B2F", stroke = 0.28) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(`not counted` = "#F8F5ED",
                               partial = "#B7B1A5",
                               earned = "#0B6F7E"),
                    name = NULL) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = clearance_pair_slots, limits = c(0.6, clearance_pair_max + 0.4)) +
  labs(x = "supported modalities", y = NULL, title = "CCC-lite boundary") +
  guides(fill = "none") +
  theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none")

(p_myc | p_bounds | (p_clear_effect / p_pair)) +
  plot_layout(widths = c(0.95, 1.0, 1.35)) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A")
```
